requirements.jd_requirement: Build new platform capabilities for security and infrastructure
requirements.matched_skills: CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code, Automated build and deploy workflows
requirements.evidence: Built production-grade internal tooling with Flask/FastAPI and CI/CD via GitHub Actions/GitLab CI; documented runbooks for operational reliability

requirements.jd_requirement: Work across security, infrastructure, and engineering teams to deploy secure systems
requirements.matched_skills: Cross-team IAM coordination, Access control implementation, Authentication provider integration
requirements.evidence: Led cross-functional IAM initiatives to align access policies across security and infrastructure teams; built identity portal architecture with MFA integrations

requirements.jd_requirement: Automate security workflows at scale (e.g., remediation, patching, hardening)
requirements.matched_skills: Python automation, Remediation scripting, Runbook-driven automation
requirements.evidence: Developed Python/PowerShell automation for endpoint patching, BitLocker enforcement, and CrowdStrike RTR remediation at scale

requirements.jd_requirement: Design and operate secure cloud services (e.g., ECS, IAM, secrets management)
requirements.matched_skills: AWS ECS deployments, IAM implementation, Secrets management
requirements.evidence: Operationalized secure AWS ECS services with secrets management and service hardening; implemented least-privilege IAM across multi-account environments

requirements.jd_requirement: Leverage data and AI to enhance security operations (e.g., correlation, anomaly detection)
requirements.evidence: Built RAG-powered security context tooling using LangChain and vector databases to surface relevant alerts and asset data; implemented confidence-based correlation logic

requirements.jd_requirement: Own end-to-end delivery of tooling with documentation and operational reliability
requirements.evidence: Owned full lifecycle delivery of internal security tooling—designed, built, documented, and supported with repeatable runbooks for cross-team adoption

tone_notes: Match OpenAI’s FDE tone: pragmatic, builder-oriented, and mission-driven. Emphasize operational reliability over theoretical security; highlight shipping, ownership, and cross-functional impact.
summary_angle: Position Conner as a security-first platform engineer who builds deployable, reliable tooling at the intersection of DevSecOps, cloud infrastructure, and AI-augmented operations—tailored to OpenAI’s forward-deployed, high-impact engineering culture.
